mapper.select: SELECT news_idx as newsIdx, auth_id as authId, news_titile as newsTitle, news_regdate as newsRegdate, news_hits as newsHits, news_content as newsContent, table_gb as tableGb FROM News ORDER BY news_idx DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{limit}

SELECT cp_idx as cpIdx, auth_id as authId, cp_titile as cpTitle, cp_regdate as cpRegdate, cp_hits as cpHits, cp_content as cpContent, table_gb as tableGb FROM ClubPhoto ORDER BY cp_idx DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{limit}
